title: Ability to use formulas on link-columns
excerpt:
Description

posts.author: np6np6 (np6np6)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would like to be able to process by any functions any value in link column:
{link-column}.text
{link-column}.url
As of 12/01/2025 , type link column is not supported in any type of function in formula processing.
EXAMPLE: There is no way to do LEFT(link-column}.text, 2) or SUBSTITUTE(link-column}.url, “old-text”, “new-text”).

What are you trying to achieve

As of 12/01/2025 , type link column is not supported in any type of function in formula processing.
EXAMPLE: There is no way to do LEFT(link-column}.text, 2) or SUBSTITUTE(link-column}.url, “old-text”, “new-text”).
